alt.zh-TW: CNIRS 中文新聞檢索系統完整操作錄影。
alt.en: Full demo recording of the CNIRS Chinese news retrieval system.

title.zh-TW: 完整 Search Engine Demo 錄影

caption.zh-TW: 展示小幫手導覽、新聞搜尋、facet browsing、模型對比、評估、診斷、分析圖譜與 feedback analytics。
caption.en: Shows the guided assistant, news search, facet browsing, model comparison, evaluation, diagnostics, analysis graph, and feedback analytics.

alt.zh-TW: CNIRS 主搜尋頁與新聞結果。
alt.en: The CNIRS main search page and news results.

alt.zh-TW: 直接點選 metadata facet 瀏覽所有符合條件的新聞。
alt.en: Direct metadata facet browsing without a lexical query.

alt.zh-TW: 文章詳情 modal，包含摘要、KWIC、keywords 與 related news。
alt.en: The document detail modal with summary, KWIC, keywords, and related news.

alt.zh-TW: BM25、TF-IDF、Hybrid 與 LM 的模型對比頁。
alt.en: The model comparison page for BM25, TF-IDF, Hybrid, and LM.

alt.zh-TW: 語料庫儀表板與 metadata 品質分析。
alt.en: The corpus dashboard and metadata quality analysis.

alt.zh-TW: Demo qrels evaluation dashboard。
alt.en: The demo qrels evaluation dashboard.

alt.zh-TW: 排序診斷頁，顯示 term contribution 與 field-aware signals。
alt.en: The ranking diagnostics page showing term contribution and field-aware signals.

alt.zh-TW: 分析圖譜頁，以節點呈現 IR pipeline 與結果層級。
alt.en: The analysis graph page visualizing the IR pipeline and result layers as nodes.

alt.zh-TW: Feedback analytics 與 LTR sandbox。
alt.en: Feedback analytics and the LTR sandbox.

alt.zh-TW: 小幫手導覽模式。
alt.en: The guided demo assistant mode.

metadata.duration: IR system hardening, deployment verification, and portfolio demo completion
responsibilities: Designed the unified retrieval API and service layer
Integrated multiple traditional IR models into a usable web demo
Built explainable search results, facets, dashboards, and analysis graph
Created Playwright verification media for portfolio review
